text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I don't like this at all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I was so close! I hate this! I hate this so much!
choice_data_list: We'll just have to work harder.
We'll just have to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I was so close! I hate this! I hate this so much!
choice_data_list: We'll just have to work harder.
We'll just have to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no crap! I know that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be a great witch, just like Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna stop at a place like this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Let's get going, Familiar! I'm gonna learn a
spell that'll guarantee I win next time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you to tell me that! That's what I'm
planning to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you too! Think of a way to make
sure that I win no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Got it? The genius Magical Girl Sweepy can't
lose! Remember that!
